name: Over Easy
tagline: Kailua locals' go-to morning spot — no-fuss, no-gimmick breakfast done exceptionally well with a relaxed neighborhood vibe.
mustOrder: Brunch Bowl — rice, eggs, protein, and veggies all in one perfect bowl
Loco moco — classic Hawaii comfort breakfast done right
Seasonal specials — always worth asking about, changes frequently
parking: Street parking on Kailua Rd and side streets, small lot nearby
talkStory: A homegrown Kailua breakfast spot that quickly became the Windward side's favorite morning ritual, known for using local ingredients and keeping the menu simple but executed perfectly.
insiderTips: Tue–Sun, closed Monday. Weekday mornings are chill but weekends get packed by 8:30am. Call ahead to get on the waitlist if going on Saturday. The outdoor seating is the move on a nice Kailua morning.
